category_sources: Official GDB site describes GDB as the GNU Project debugger.
source_facts.description says this is the GNU debugger for i386-elf cross development.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as the GDB cross-development formula for i386-elf.
docs_sources: Official GDB documentation page provides online GDB manuals and reference material.
repo_sources: Official GDB current source page gives https://sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git as the read-only git repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official GDB documentation describes the debugger and its manuals.
source_facts.description identifies GNU debugger and i386-elf cross development.
